message:
fix(twitter): correct operation names to match connector dispatch

Operation names in manifest must use dotted format (e.g., "twitter.user.me")
to match the connector's dispatch_operation match arms. Previously used
snake_case (e.g., "user_me") which would cause all operations to fail
with "Unknown operation" errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
